commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=65b6b9c81a982b7a799ec758fd7a742e66f63a6d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a startup-recovery helper that clears `abortedLastRun` from running session-store rows after restart recovery retries are exhausted.

PR surface: Source +41. Total +41 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current recovery uses `abortedLastRun` as the durable selector for restart recovery, and the linked report shows a real post-restart stuck session. I did not establish a full live gateway-restart reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is maintainer review of the canonical recovery-owner fix path, not a narrow safe automated repair on this branch.

target.title: [Bug]: Session stuck in permanent busy state after mid-turn gateway restart — no auto-recovery, only /new or /reset clears it
target.author: lzyyzznl

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
